title: Rich Spicy Tunisian Tomato Tagine
description: A spicy and comforting Tunisian dish featuring a rich tomato sauce, made with a variety of spices and ingredients, and cooked to perfection in a papillote, shojin-friendly style.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for another minute.
Stir in the paprika, cumin, and cayenne pepper and cook for 1 minute.
Add the crushed canned tomatoes, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Prepare the papillote by cutting a piece of parchment paper into a large square.
Place the tomato sauce in the center of the parchment paper and fold the paper to form a packet.
Bake the tagine in a preheated oven at 375 degrees for 15 minutes.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro.
